tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List the connected social accounts on this Postlia workspace.

tools.name: create_post
tools.description: Create a text post. Provide scheduledAt (ISO datetime) to schedule, queue=true for the next open queue slot, or neither to post within ~5 minutes.

tools.name: cancel_post
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post by id.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_scheduled_posts, create_post · Public sink: create_post, cancel_post.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_scheduled_posts, create_post · Public sink: create_post, cancel_post

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
